title: Specklinia coeloglossa
intro: Specklinia coeloglossa is a species of orchid, commonly known as a terrestrial orchid, that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Specklinia coeloglossa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Specklinia coeloglossa are infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to promote digestive health and immune system function.
taxonomy: Specklinia coeloglossa is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids native to the Americas. Within the Specklinia genus, S. coeloglossa is further classified as a part of the subgenus Brachystachys. The species S. coeloglossa is also known by its synonym, Pleurothallis coeloglossa. This classification places S. coeloglossa among the epiphytic orchids that thrive in humid environments.
